data.body: B1 (a118) CODE pushed to Gerrit change 434 (Change-Id I007173c); make lint+typecheck+test all green. Awaiting Verified+1 + LLM-Review+1 to submit. B1 ticket stays OPEN after code lands (3+hr operational gate: >=10 clean shadow passes + capped live heal + flag flip remain). Session delivered: 9622 merged+closed (change 433), B1 code pushed (change 434). Remaining epic work is all multi-hour-gated: B1 operational validation (3+hrs), D1/d01e comprehensive live Jira matrix (hours), eca4 broad loader refactor (do LAST — all reconciler test files use spec_from_file_location loading that eca4 changes). Epic cannot fully close this session due to wall-clock gates; clean handoff to follow.
